name: Unsigned Executable Loaded In lsass
notes: This rule triggers when an unsigned driver is loaded in lsass.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
when the event matches "Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Unsigned Executable Loaded In lsass on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
AND when the event matches "Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Unsigned Executable Loaded Into lsass.exe
Event description: Unsigned Executable Loaded Into lsass.exe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
